transcript:
Woman: Hello, what is your name?
Man: My name is Rahul.
Woman: How old are you?
Man: I have 22.
Robot: I have 22 नहीं, I am 22 years old होता है। [Not 'I have 22', it is 'I am 22 years old'.]
Man: Okay okay, I am 22 years old.
Woman: Where are you from?
Man: I am Uttar Pradesh.
Robot: I am Uttar Pradesh नहीं, I am from Uttar Pradesh होगा। [Not 'I am Uttar Pradesh', it will be 'I am from Uttar Pradesh'.]
Man: Oh... ठीक है ठीक है। मुझे इंग्लिश अच्छे से नहीं आती। [Oh... okay okay. I don't know English very well.]
Robot: कोई प्रॉब्लम नहीं। AI teachers ट्राई किया? [No problem. Did you try AI teachers?]
Man: वो तो महंगे होते होंगे ना? [They must be expensive, right?]
Robot: बिल्कुल नहीं। नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस से सात गुना सस्ता है। इसलिए 50 लाख लोग MySivi पर इंग्लिश प्रैक्टिस कर रहे हैं। [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing English on MySivi.]
Man: पर टाइम नहीं मिलता। [But I don't get time.]
Robot: रोज़ की सिर्फ 15-20 मिनट की... [Just 15-20 minutes of daily...]
Robot: ...की प्रैक्टिस काफी है। बिल्कुल कॉन्फिडेंट हो जाओगे। [...practice is enough. You will become completely confident.]
Man: वाओ! कैसे ज्वाइन करूं? [Wow! How do I join?]
Robot: ये इंस्टॉल का बटन दबाओ और MySivi ऐप इंस्टॉल करो। सिर्फ 15 दिनों में तुम्हें इंप्रूवमेंट दिखने लगेगी। चलो, शुरू हो जाओ। [Press this install button and install the MySivi app. In just 15 days, you will start seeing improvement. Come on, get started.]
Voiceover: Install Now पे क्लिक करो और MySivi ऐप डाउनलोड करो। [Click on Install Now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: what is your name; My name is Rahul; How old are you?; I have 22; I am 22 yrs old; I am 22 years old; Where are you from?; I am Uttar Pradesh; I am from Uttar Pradesh; Oh... theek hai; Mujhe English; Koi problem nahi; AI teachers try; hote honge na; Bilkul nahi; classes; 7X CHEAPER; MySivi AI English Speakin... Install; Sivi is now MySivi; Improve English speaking with AI; English Speaking App - Improve Your Spoken English And Fluency With AI Support; Par time nahi; Roz ki sirf 15-20; minute ki practice; Bilkul confident; Kaise join karun; MySivi AI English Speakin... Install; Master Spoken Eng; Sharpen your Englis 1-on-1 calls. Try MyS fast; right now; MySivi AI English Speakin... Cancel; Sirf 15 dino mein; tumhe improvement; dikhne lagegi; Shuru ho jao; MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An AI portrait in a museum corrects a visitor's English grammar mistakes in real-time. The AI then promotes the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool to build speaking confidence. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
